brief_justification: Correct answer (shelf) with valid theory-of-mind reasoning; multi-level analysis tracking belief states vs actual locations across time; some self-monitoring via reasoning context framework but no explicit bias checks; basic verification by citing the key passage but no counterfactual testing; distinguishes Simon's belief from reality but doesn't quantify uncertainty; implicitly considers desk as alternative (actual location) but doesn't systematically evaluate other possibilities; excellent audit trail with timestamped table showing object locations and awareness states at each story moment
